title: Can AI be your therapist? Here’s what a psychologist wants you to know: ‘We need to stop…’

title: Krazimo Helps Businesses Get the Most Out of Artificial Intelligence

title: Microsoft to invest $10 billion for Japan AI data centres
description: Microsoft said it will invest $10 billion in Japan over the next four years to build artificial intelligence data centres and related infrastructure.
content:
Microsoft said Friday it will invest $10 billion in Japan over the next four years to build artificial intelligence data centres and related infrastructure.
